meaning: adj.不可驯养的,难驯服的,不能制服的
examples: All beings of the desire Realm, with the exception of sages, are afflicted with untamable desires.
It was untamable and inedible, yet possessed quasi-human intelligence and itself hunted close to human habitations.
His good friend Luchóg, smallest of us all, was forever pushing back an untamable lock of night-black hair that curled across his forehead like the tail of a mouse.
If so, Suzanne would no doubt be resisting with untamable fury.
War, by its nature, is barbarous, grievous, and untamable.
